title: Transport hazard summary: surface water flooding
body: "This summary identifies some of the main risks caused by surface water flooding, such as sudden flash flooding in busy areas and how they can impact transport. It also provides advice to help mitigate and plan for these risks.  Direct impacts from surface water flooding include:   impacts to safety due to rapid flooding trapping vehicles and passengers damage to vehicles and disruption to transport services   This forms part of the Transport hazards summaries series, which helps organisations understand hazards that can impact UK transport. "
